An Ulka or meteor and Dhisnya bear fruit in a fortnight; a
thunderbolt, in three fortnights; and lightning as well as Tara, in
six days,

The TZra meteor produces only a quarter of the effects; the
Dhisnya, a half of it; while the remaining three produce their effects
in full measure.
The thunderbolt falls with a deafening sound upon men,
